title: Mo Spells
description: An Electroblob's Wizardry spell pack for Mowzie's Mobs!
body:
### Description

This spell pack creates an integration between Electroblob's Wizardry and Mowzie's Mobs mod by adding 17 new spells and 6 unique artefacts which are related to the Mowzie's Mobs mod. This includes powerful combat spells, new creature summon spells, and more!



 
### Dependencies

- Electroblob's Wizardry

- Mowzie's Mobs

- WizardryUtils

 
### Credits
- Created by WinDanesz
- Bob Mowzie - the creator of the Mowzie's Mobs mod. This mod relies on many of his entities, effects, and visuals.
- Electroblob - the creator of his awesome Electroblob's Wizardry Mod.
